description: Create complete English README_EN.md - professional translation adapted for international developers, same structure as Chinese README but with English-appropriate examples and phrasing.
steps: Read the newly written README.md (from FEAT-001) to use as the source
Create README_EN.md at project root with professional English translation
Adapt content for international developers: use English persona names primarily, keep Chinese names in parentheses for Chinese investors
Include English CLI examples and API documentation
Link back to Chinese version with header: 'English | [中文](README.md)'
Ensure all SVG diagram references use the same paths (docs/images/*.svg)
Version log entries should be in English
Keep the same badge structure but with English text where applicable
acceptance_criteria: All features accurately documented in English
All SVG references are correct paths
verification: grep -c 'README.md' README_EN.md returns at least 1 (link to Chinese version)
grep -c 'docs/images/' README_EN.md returns multiple (SVG references intact)
